title: OutputTokens
description: Schema for the game console definitions used to map DAT names to output tokens and file extensions

datNameRegex.description: A JavaScript regex literal string (e.g. "/pattern/i") matched against DAT names to identify the console

adam.description: Adam image ROM subdirectory /ROMS/{adam}, as defined by https://github.com/eduardofilo/RG350_adam_image/wiki/En:-3.-Content-installation#roms

batocera.description: Batocera ROM subdirectory roms/{batocera}, as defined by https://wiki.batocera.org/systems

crossmix.description: CrossMix-OS ROM subdirectory /Roms/{crossmix}, as defined by https://github.com/cizia64/CrossMix-OS/wiki/Emulators

es.description: EmulationStation ROM subdirectory roms/{emulationstation}, as defined by https://gitlab.com/es-de/emulationstation-de/-/raw/master/resources/systems/linux/es_systems.xml

funkeyos.description: FunKey S ROM subdirectory /mnt/{funkeyos}, as defined by https://doc.funkey-project.com/developer_guide/software_reference/sd_card_layout/directory_structure/

minui.description: MinUI ROM subdirectory /Roms/{minui}, as defined by the subdirectories of https://github.com/shauninman/MinUI/tree/main/skeleton/BASE/Roms and https://github.com/shauninman/MinUI/tree/main/skeleton/EXTRAS/Roms

mister.description: MiSTer ROM subdirectory /games/{mister}, as defined by https://mister-devel.github.io/MkDocs_MiSTer/cores/console/ and https://mister-devel.github.io/MkDocs_MiSTer/cores/computer/ and https://mister-devel.github.io/MkDocs_MiSTer/cores/other/

miyoocfw.description: MiyooCFW ROM subdirectory /roms/{miyoocfw}, as defined by https://github.com/TriForceX/MiyooCFW/wiki/Emulator-Info

onion.description: OnionOS/GarlicOS ROM subdirectory /Roms/{onion}, as defined by https://onionui.github.io/docs/emulators/folders

romm.description: RomM ROM subdirectory /romm/library/{romm}, as defined by https://docs.romm.app/latest/Platforms-and-Players/Supported-Platforms/

spruce.description: SpruceOS ROM subdirectory /Roms/{spruce}, as defined by https://github.com/spruceUI/spruceOS/wiki/11.-Adding-Games#rom-folder-chart
